title: Unit Index
description: Specification for the main data file for assessment units.

id.description: Short name/key/id of the unit as used in a specific testing.

uuid.description: Universal id to identify versions and variants in many different assessments.

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp of last change. This is related to the index, not to the separate data blocks.

label.description: This data is usually taken as readable name or title in lists

description.description: This data can be used for notes/comments to better understand the purpose of the unit

userInterface.description: Definition of visual presentation and interaction features.

player.description: Verona player module to run the unit.

editor.description: Verona player module to edit the unit ui.

type.description: Used to specify the data type of the UI.

definitionId.description: Key to find the user interface definition. Usually this is the full filename without path.

definitionInline.description: Full stringified UI definition. If definitionId is given too, this property will be ignored.
examples: Bitte warte auf die Freigabe durch die Testleitung!

externalDataBlock.description: External file as part of the unit data.

id.description: Key to find the data block. Usually this is the full filename without path.

type.description: Used to specify the data type of the block. Best pracise use <id>@<version> (see example)

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp of last change. This is independent from the DateTime of the file in the file system.

externalDependency.description: External file or service this unit's running or data processing depends on.

id.description: Key to find the dependency. This can be a filename or url depending on the mode property.

mode.description: Used to specify the access mode of the dependency
